title: cantinoa indivisa
intro: Cantinoa indivisa, also known as Purple Cornflower or Mountain Mint, is a plant species native to the Andean region, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cantinoa indivisa include reducing inflammation, relieving stomach pain, and providing antioxidant protection. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
